title: Compliance Analyst
description: Charles Schwab is seeking a Compliance Analyst for our San Jose headquarters to ensure regulatory adherence across operations. You'll work on-site in a critical role, monitoring compliance and protecting client interests.
responsibilities: Monitor compliance with financial regulations and internal policies
Review transactions and communications for regulatory violations
Prepare compliance reports and documentation for regulatory bodies
Conduct training on compliance requirements for staff
Investigate potential compliance breaches and recommend corrective actions
Stay current with changing regulations and industry standards

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Law, Compliance, or related field
skills: Knowledge of financial regulations (SEC, FINRA, etc.)
Attention to detail and regulatory awareness
certifications: Certified Compliance Officer (CCO) or Series 7/63 preferred

benefits: On-site position at San Jose headquarters
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
